name: AWS SAM (Serverless Application Model)
what_it_does: AWS framework for building serverless applications with simplified CloudFormation syntax, local testing via sam local, and fast Lambda deployments.
use_cases: Deploy Lambda functions with simplified YAML (10x less than raw CloudFormation) for serverless agents
Test Lambda functions locally before deployment with sam local invoke and sam local start-api
Build event-driven architectures connecting Lambda to API Gateway, SQS, DynamoDB Streams, and S3
Implement serverless CI/CD pipelines using sam pipeline for multi-environment deployments
Use sam sync for hot-swapping Lambda code without full CloudFormation stack update (seconds not minutes)
not_for: Container or EC2-based workloads — SAM is Lambda-first; use CDK or CloudFormation for general IaC
Multi-cloud serverless — SAM is AWS-only; use Serverless Framework for multi-cloud
Teams who need Terraform's state management and provider ecosystem
best_when: Best for Lambda-centric serverless applications on AWS where local testing and fast iteration are priorities.
avoid_when: Avoid for complex multi-service architectures where CDK's imperative programming model is more expressive.

auth.notes: Uses AWS credentials from environment or ~/.aws/credentials. Deployments require IAM permissions for CloudFormation + Lambda + S3.

pricing.free_tier_limits: SAM CLI is free — Lambda and other provisioned resources are billed normally
pricing.notes: AWS SAM framework is free. Lambda invocations and other AWS resources incur costs.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: sam deploy errors surface CloudFormation stack events — must check events for resource-level failure details.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: sam deploy is idempotent — re-running with same template is safe.
known_agent_gotchas: sam local invoke uses a Docker container to emulate Lambda — requires Docker running and correct architecture (--arm64 for M1 Mac)
sam sync (hot swap) bypasses CloudFormation for Lambda code changes but does NOT work for infrastructure changes (new resources, IAM)
SAM template Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31 is required — without it, SAM shorthand (AWS::Serverless::Function) is not recognized
Globals section applies to all functions — overriding in individual functions requires repeating the entire property, not just the diff
sam build creates .aws-sam/build — this directory must be present for sam deploy; always run sam build before sam deploy in CI

security_score_components.security_notes: Never embed secrets in SAM templates — use SSM Parameter Store or Secrets Manager references in template parameters.
